name: terminal-guru
description: Terminal diagnostics, tool composition, workflow discovery, and environment expert for macOS/Unix systems. Includes an orchestrator agent that diagnoses problems, composes tools into workflows, and discovers usage patterns. Five focused skills: terminal-emulation (terminfo, Unicode, display), zsh-dev (autoload functions, fpath, testing, performance), signals-monitoring (macOS logging, Unix signals, file watching, notifications), environment-composition (tool composition engine, fzf patterns, workflow discovery, sesh config), and mise-tooling (mise.toml config, task automation, multi-tenant credentials, tool versioning).
